milestones.name: Runtime Spine
milestones.objective: 稳定 root SDK defaults、runtime identity、message/event/step/export/import/checkpoint/resume 基础契约，让 graph 可以在稳定 step 边界恢复。

milestones.name: Model Spine
milestones.objective: 提供 provider-neutral model contract、provider registry/router、route set、fallback decision、middleware、fake provider 和 OpenAI-compatible reference adapter。
open_items: 真实 OpenAI/Anthropic/Gemini/OpenRouter provider adapter 移入外部 gopact-adapters-model 仓库
生产级 provider 健康检查、预算策略和评测治理继续由 adapter/plugin 深化

milestones.name: Tool and Sandbox Spine
milestones.objective: 提供 visible/deferred tool registry、artifact、sandbox、policy、tool middleware、retry/effect/replay 和 verification evidence 第一片。
open_items: tools.CommitStore / WithReplayCommitStore replay commit ledger 第一片已落地；生产级 tool exactly-once ledger 持久化、外部 commit store adapter、跨 worker 冲突处理仍需在 adapter 或宿主 worker 中实现
root SecretRef / SecretProvider / SecretValue secret provider 原子契约已具备第一片；更完整 sandbox profile、secret 继承授权策略和 prompt-injection defense 策略仍需继续深化

milestones.name: Integration and Extensibility Spine
milestones.objective: 提供 memory、skill、MCP、A2A、TurnLoop、middleware、plugin、channel/transfer、policy/redaction 和外部集成路线第一片。
open_items: MCP/A2A production transport、Lark 真实 client/OAuth、A2UI renderer、AG-UI WebSocket/plugin 仍在外部仓库路线中
真实 LangSmith SDK、LangGraph exporter policy/redaction 深化和插件级治理仍需外部 plugin/adapter 完成

milestones.name: Agent Template and Evidence Layer
milestones.objective: 在原子能力之上验证 ReAct、Agent-as-Tool、Dev Agent template contract、trajectory golden、verification evidence、entropy audit 和 reviewer/release gate。
open_items: self-bootstrap workflow release evidence 真实场景仍需扩展；release bundle conformance helper 已覆盖具体 CI gate requirement、release_bundle evidence metadata 对齐，以及 workflow release parent summary 与 bundle process 的 task/gate/review/count 对齐，workflow process conformance helper 已覆盖 workflow parent/child link、action order、failed summary、required input source、workflow output 与 child summary 的 mode/action/action_status 以及 input/intervention count、release child summary 的 release gate input id / review intervention id 对账、input/intervention metadata、合法 action index、boundary mode/action/action_status 对齐、release action 的 release gate input 与 allowed release 的 resolved review intervention 对账和 patch raw diff 不泄漏，action governance metadata 贯穿 process/workflow 边界、template trajectory conformance 已覆盖 runtime identity consistency，ReAct 普通 multi-tool-then-final 与 multi-tool-error golden trajectory、Agent-as-Tool local child run / local child failure / remote A2A stream / remote A2A send failure / remote A2A send timeout / remote A2A send policy deny / remote A2A stream policy deny / remote A2A cancel success / remote A2A cancel policy deny golden trajectory、Dev Agent rejected workflow child summary 场景和 self-bootstrap release golden trajectory 已覆盖；更多 template-specific golden trajectory tests 和更广 Dev Agent workflow process record 场景仍需扩展

ReAct memory worker 单次 pass、本地内存 DeferredMemoryWorkQueue、本地 visibility timeout reference、外部 durable queue 可复用的 visibility conformance helper、默认有界 retry/backoff decider、worker 默认 decider 接线、worker executor、RunOnce lease gate / pass-local lease renewal token fencing、release 幂等清理、有界 drain loop 和 retry/stop/dead-letter 调度决策 evidence 已具备；durable 生产队列 adapter、distributed queue leasing、并发调度、生产级调度策略、真实 retry/DLQ storage 和更高级 memory 压缩/合并策略仍需 template adapter 或宿主 harness 实现
远端 CI run/job/step 已观察结果 -> ci_gate evidence 桥接已具备第一片；model review 真实评测治理、CI provider 拉取/重跑/secret 治理和人工 release gate 仍需生产化

milestones.name: Production Hardening
milestones.objective: 让 core SDK、public API、schema、CI、release gate、文档、迁移策略和外部扩展仓库达到可长期依赖的状态。

evidence_records.notes: GitHub Actions run 28199128163 completed successfully on main; run steps Check whitespace, Test, Race, Vet, Lint, Coverage, Examples, and Security were all success.

Remote audit shows all 11 private external scaffold repositories exist and have CI workflows, but all lack GOPACT_GITHUB_TOKEN and their latest Actions runs fail because github.token cannot read the private core SDK repository.

open_items: 外部仓库 scaffold、sync-plan、sync-repos 脚本、sync-secrets 脚本、本地 -verify 和 -remote-status-json 远端审计已统一绑定 manifest required CI commands；2026-06-26 已真实创建并推送 11 个 gopact-ai 私有外部 scaffold 仓库，主仓已推送 v0.0.0 tag，外部仓库均已补充 go.sum 和私有 SDK 读取 workflow，remote audit 显示仓库存在、私有且 CI workflow 文件存在，并能直接审计 GOPACT_GITHUB_TOKEN secret；最新 remote audit 显示 11 个外部仓库均缺少 GOPACT_GITHUB_TOKEN，最新 GitHub Actions run 仍全部失败，当前共性原因是默认 github.token 不能读取私有主仓 github.com/gopact-ai/gopact，需要配置具备主仓 read 权限的 GOPACT_GITHUB_TOKEN repo/org secret 后重跑 CI，secret 未配置前 M6 不能视为完成
v1 前仍需继续外迁或删除主仓中过渡性生产 adapter/template

required_gates: human or reviewer decision before release
